intro: Bivonaea albiflora, also known as the "white-flowered Bivonaea," is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to the island of Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and fever.
